title: Global visibility gaps in women's lung-cancer prevention equity: public data and code
description: Cleaned aggregate country-level dataset, source indicator dictionary, analysis outputs, supplementary tables, supplementary figures, and reproduction scripts for a cross-national ecological study of visibility gaps in women's lung-cancer prevention equity.
